prompt: Design a budgeting app interface that displays a monthly expenses pie chart matching the visual style of the first image, while using the exact expense categories and numerical values from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a mobile budgeting app interface. Replicate the dark theme, 'Monthly Expenses' title, date range ('From April 1' to 'Till April 30'), and overall layout of image 1. The central pie chart, consistent in visual style with image 1, must display segments representing the specific expense categories and exact numerical values from image 2: 'Mortgage' ($1,550.00), 'Electric' ($6.48), 'Water' ($40.00), and 'Internet' ($50.00). The total expenses shown in the center of the pie chart should be the sum of these values ($1,646.48), with accurate percentages displayed on each segment. Below the pie chart, include a legend, matching the visual format of image 1, listing these four categories from image 2 with their corresponding precise numerical values.
objects: Mobile budgeting app interface with dark theme
Date range input fields showing 'From April 1' and 'Till April 30'
Central pie chart with visual style matching image 1
Pie chart segments representing 'Mortgage' ($1,550.00), 'Electric' ($6.48), 'Water' ($40.00), 'Internet' ($50.00) with accurate percentages
Pie chart center displaying total expenses '$1,646.48 Expenses'
Legend below the pie chart, matching visual format of image 1
